passages.title: My Family
passages.text:
My name is Tom. I am eight years old. I have a happy family. My father is a doctor. My mother is a teacher. I have one sister. Her name is Lily. She is six years old.

We have a dog. His name is Spot. He is white and black. We all love Spot very much. On weekends, we play in the park together.

speaking_practice.prompt: Tell me about your family in English.
speaking_practice.hint: Use: My father is..., My mother is..., I have...

passages.title: My School
passages.text:
I go to Green Hill School. It is a big and beautiful school. There are 30 classrooms in my school. My classroom is on the second floor.

I like my school very much. My teacher's name is Miss Li. She is kind and funny. We have English, Chinese, Math and PE classes. My favourite class is PE. I love playing football with my friends.

comprehension_questions.q: What is the child's favourite class?
Why does the child like the teacher?
comprehension_questions.a: Because she is kind and funny.

speaking_practice.hint: Use: My school is..., There are..., My favourite class is...

passages.title: A Rainy Day
passages.text:
Yesterday was a rainy day. The sky was grey and the wind was cold. I couldn't go outside to play.

I stayed at home with my family. My mother made hot soup for us. My father read a book. My little brother and I played board games. We laughed a lot.

Although I couldn't play outside, I had a wonderful time at home. Sometimes rainy days can be fun!

comprehension_questions.q: What was the weather like yesterday?
comprehension_questions.a: It was rainy, grey and cold.

comprehension_questions.q: Did the child enjoy the day? Why?
comprehension_questions.a: Yes, because they had fun at home with family.

speaking_practice.prompt: What do you do on a rainy day?
speaking_practice.hint: Use: On a rainy day, I usually..., I like to..., I sometimes...

passages.title: Protecting Our Environment
passages.text:
Our environment is in danger. Every day, factories produce smoke and waste that pollutes the air and water. People throw rubbish everywhere and cut down too many trees.

We must protect our environment. Here are some things we can do. First, we should recycle paper, glass and plastic. Second, we should save water and electricity. Third, we should plant more trees and flowers.

If everyone does a little bit, we can make a big difference. Let's work together to keep our planet clean and beautiful!

comprehension_questions.q: What are two things that harm the environment?
comprehension_questions.a: Factories produce smoke/waste; people cut down trees.

comprehension_questions.q: Name two things we can do to help.
comprehension_questions.a: Recycle; save water/electricity; plant trees (any two).

comprehension_questions.q: What does 'make a big difference' mean?
comprehension_questions.a: To have a great positive effect/change things a lot.

speaking_practice.prompt: What do you do to protect the environment?
speaking_practice.hint: Use: I always/sometimes..., I try to..., In my opinion, we should...

passages.title: The Story of Tea
passages.text:
Tea is one of the most popular drinks in the world. It has a long history of over 4,000 years. Tea was first discovered in China.

According to a legend, Emperor Shennong discovered tea when some tea leaves fell into his boiling water. He found the drink delicious and refreshing.

Today, tea is grown in many countries, including China, India and Japan. There are different types of tea, such as green tea, black tea and oolong tea. Each type has its own special taste and health benefits.

Drinking tea has many health benefits. It can help you relax and stay healthy.

comprehension_questions.q: How many years of history does tea have?
How was tea discovered according to the legend?
comprehension_questions.a: Tea leaves fell into the Emperor's boiling water.

comprehension_questions.q: Name three types of tea mentioned.
comprehension_questions.a: Green tea, black tea and oolong tea.

comprehension_questions.q: Why is drinking tea good for you?
comprehension_questions.a: It has health benefits, helps you relax and stay healthy.

speaking_practice.prompt: Tell me about a traditional food or drink from China.
speaking_practice.hint: Use: ... has a long history..., It is made from..., People drink/eat it when...

exchanges.cue: Hi! I'm new here. What's your name?
exchanges.model: Hi! My name is [name]. Nice to meet you!
exchanges.hint: 用 My name is... 介绍自己

exchanges.model: I'm [age] years old. How about you?
exchanges.hint: 用 I'm... years old 说年龄

exchanges.model: My favourite subject is English. I like it because it's fun!
exchanges.hint: 用 My favourite... is... 表达喜好

exchanges.model: Yes, please. I want to buy some pencils.
exchanges.hint: 用 I want to buy... 表达购物需求
用 I'd like... 更礼貌

exchanges.cue: That's five yuan. Here you are.
Excuse me. Is there a library near here?
exchanges.model: Yes, there is. Go straight and turn left at the traffic lights.
exchanges.hint: 用 Go straight / Turn left/right 指路

exchanges.model: It's about five minutes on foot.
exchanges.hint: 用 It's about... minutes 说距离

exchanges.model: You're welcome! Have a nice day!
I have a headache and a sore throat. I feel terrible.
exchanges.hint: 用 I have a... 描述症状

exchanges.cue: How long have you felt this way?
exchanges.model: Since this morning. I didn't sleep well last night.

exchanges.cue: You should rest and drink lots of water. Take this medicine.
exchanges.model: Thank you, doctor. Should I go home?
